context.intro: TS9 encompasses MIDDLESBROUGH and its surrounding areas in Teesside, North East.
context.priceVsCounty: The average property price in TS9 is £339,419, which is 79% above the Teesside average of £189,841.

context.broadbandContext: Average broadband download speeds in TS9 are 229.0 Mbps, with 99% of premises having access to superfast broadband and 78% with full fibre (FTTP) connectivity.
context.synthesis: TS9 (MIDDLESBROUGH) offers property prices near the national average (£339,419), low crime (94% below national average), 8 nearby schools, and excellent broadband (229 Mbps average).
